settingsPanel.title: Learning Settings
settingsPanel.iconMaster: Mark card as mastered (won't appear again after next review)
settingsPanel.iconHide: Hide card (won't appear again after next review)
settingsPanel.cardsPerBatchDescription: Number of cards to add at once
settingsPanel.autoAddCardsDescription: Automatically add new cards when none are due
settingsPanel.initialReviewsDescription: Number of initial reviews for new cards
settingsPanel.autoPlayDescription: Auto-play audio when a card is shown
settingsPanel.showProgressBarDescription: Show the audio progress bar and seek controls
settingsPanel.hideTargetLanguagesDescription: Blur target language text by default
settingsPanel.autoRevealLanguagesDescription: Unblur text as soon as its audio starts playing
settingsPanel.autoAdvanceDescription: Advance to next card after audio finishes
settingsPanel.repetitionsDescription: How many times each language is played per card
settingsPanel.playbackSequenceDescription: Preview of the audio playback order
settingsPanel.reviewModeAudioDescription: Listen to audio playback of your phrases. No need to look at the screen and manually rate the cards. Ideal for learning without looking at the screen — practice on the go while walking, commuting, or relaxing.
settingsPanel.reviewModeFullDescription: Type the translations and see a character-level comparison with the correct answer. Best for active practice — engages recall and spelling.
settingsPanel.fullReviewTargetAudioDescription: When to play target language audio
settingsPanel.instantProceedDescription: Advance to the next card immediately when a rating button is clicked

reviewMode.title: How do you want to review?

full.title: Full Review
full.description: Practice writing by typing translations. Best for active practice while looking at the screen.

audio.title: Audio Review
audio.description: Practice listening and speaking with audio playback. There is no need to look at the screen. Ideal for learning on the go — while walking, commuting, or relaxing.

baseLanguage.title: What language will you learn from?
baseLanguage.subtitle: Select your base language

targetLanguage.title: What language do you want to learn?
targetLanguage.subtitle: Select a language

difficulty.title: How much do you already know?

elementary.title: Basic
elementary.description: I know the most common words

finished.title: You're all set!
finished.subtitle: Your personalized learning experience is ready.

welcome.title: Welcome to Cacatua!
welcome.description: We'll give you a quick overview to help you get started. You can dismiss this at any time.

learningModes.title: Learning Modes
learningModes.description: Cacatua has 2 different types of review modes. Full Review lets you practice by typing translations — great for focused study. Audio Review plays sentences aloud so you can learn on the go.

difficultySelection.title: Difficulty Selection
difficultySelection.description: Here you can select your difficulty. Each difficulty is a collection of sentences for you to learn. You can click on a collection to preview the upcoming sentences.

welcome.title: Welcome to Audio Review
welcome.description: In this mode you can review sentences hands-off. The texts are read aloud automatically and it proceeds to the next card automatically. You can adjust the timing in the settings.

card.title: The Card
card.description: This card shows the texts in the languages you are learning. You can add more languages to the course later if you want.

targetText.title: Target Text and Audio
targetText.description: The target translation is hidden by default. It will be unblurred automatically or if you click on it. You can also play audio by clicking on the audio button.

rating.title: Rate Your Recall
rating.description: Each card is shown an initial number of times before spaced repetition starts. "Understood" skips the rest of those initial reviews. After that, you'll see more detailed ratings: Again, Hard, Good, Easy.

audioControls.title: Audio Playing
audioControls.description: By default the audio is played automatically. First the base audio, then there is a pause for you to think and then the target audio is played before automatically proceeding to the next card.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Here you can change playback speed, language order, auto-advance, whether to hide or blur the target text, how many initial reviews each card gets and more.

welcome.title: Welcome to Full Review
welcome.description: In this mode you actively practice writing and get instant feedback.

card.title: The Card
card.description: The card in this mode shows the target and base languages and allows you to type in the translations.

input.title: Enter Your Translation
input.description: Here you enter the translation. You can also listen to the audio of the target language before typing it in.

rating.title: Rate Your Answer
rating.description: After viewing the feedback, rate how well you recalled: Again, Hard, Good, or Easy. This drives the spaced repetition schedule.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Here you can customize your settings. You can switch between review modes and adjust audio settings.

chat.title: Chat Assistant
chat.description: Use the chat to ask about grammar, get explanations, or create new flashcards. The AI assistant is here to help you learn!
